emails.subject: New Product Launch Details
emails.body:
Hi Mike,

Please send the following product announcement to our customer list:

Subject: Exciting New Product Launch!

Dear Valued Customer,

We are thrilled to announce our latest product innovation! This revolutionary solution will transform the way you work.

Key Features:
- Enhanced performance
- User-friendly interface
- Competitive pricing

Contact us today to learn more!

Best regards,
The Sales Team
